flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Washington University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (9.5k → 7.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Central Washington University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (49.9% vs 55.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Washington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
